name: argo
description: Argo's portable engineering 'way of working' for Claude Code — opinionated but non-breaking. Ships active: on-demand discipline skills, full-lifecycle agent roles, a Figma-to-code design pack shaped as a mechanism (provider-neutral core) plus swappable recipes — one recipe implemented today, shadcn-tailwind-external-kit — (setup-design/figma-audit/figma-sync/figma-create/figma-wireframe/figma-to-code/design-upgrade, plus the figma-design-kit and figma-design-kit-shadcn-tailwind packages), with a Semantic-seeding extension point that bootstraps a project's Primitives/Semantic variable collections from the recipe's kit and a twelfth tier-0 mechanism rule (D24 gap/padding spacing), and five hook categories — safety guardrails (dangerous-git, pipe-to-shell, lockfile-edit, bash-source-write, always on), self-scoping build gates (red-proof, trust — armed only during gated builds via .argo/build-mode.json, inert otherwise), design-guard gates (record/stop/commit-gate — armed by design/config.json alone, independent of build-mode, enforcing tier-0 audit receipts and a fresh passing spec-diff receipt for componentsPath commits), write hygiene (format-on-write, test-smell), and a session-start way-of-working card. Opinionated rules ship inert as templates the setup-claude skill installs adapted to the host project's stack. Works in any project, with or without the Argo cockpit. See README.
